name: S-12
events: 30 Sep 1942 S-12 fired torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a German Schlesien-class battleship off Klaipeda, Lithuania. S-12 claimed a sinking. In reality a small German auxiliary minesweeper was attacked but missed !!!
5 Oct 1942 S-12 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 8000 tons off Libau. The torpedoes missed their target.

6 Oct 1942 S-12 fires four torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant south-west of Klaipeda, Lithuania. The torpedoes missed and the target was engaged with gunfire but was not hit. The ship attacked was the small German auxiliary patrol vessel V 1707 / Viking IV.
21 Oct 1942 S-12 torpedoed and damaged the German merchant Sabine Howald (5956 GRT) about 10 nautical miles south-south-west of Libau in position 56°21'N, 20°55'E.

27 Oct 1942 S-12 torpedoed and damaged the German merchant Malgache (former French, 6903 GRT) about 20 nautical miles north of Libau in position 56°52'N, 20°59'E. The Malgache is grounded to prevent her from sinking and later salvaged. The Swedish merchant Gordias (1632 BRT) is missed in the same attack.
